title: sub_GAME_7F0431E4: acosf operand sum association differs from retail (a+(b+c) vs (a+b)+c) in projectile spin-rate derivation
repro: audit: asm_audit.py entry sub_GAME_7F0431E4; ASM chrobjhandler.c:6750-7048 vs live C 6573-6733. Observable only via trace comparator on proj->unk64 (unclamped range 0.03..0.15) for thrown/dropped projectiles

history.note: Single divergence re-derived from GLOBAL_ASM (retail 7F0431E4) vs live C: the acosf operand in the default spin-rate path. Retail: f8=mtx02*arg1z (mul chrobjhandler.c:6988), f6=arg1x*m00 (6992), f4=arg1y*m01 (6994), f10=f6+f4 (6995), f6=f8+f10 (6997) = a+(b+c). Live C 6708: (mtx02*arg1z + argX*mtx00) + arg1y*mtx01 = (a+b)+c. FP addition is not associative -> up-to-1-ulp difference in the acos input, propagating through /scale^2, acosf, /g_GlobalTimerDelta, /theta into proj->unk64 (projectile rotation-speed factor, clamped [0.029999999, 0.15000001] so bounded). All other paths verified equivalent: ~0x10000 clear + 0x80 gate, type==1 projectileFree branch, flag clears ~1/~4, quaternion/matrix call chain and unkC0/C4/C8 magnitudes (outer adds are commutative-only swaps, exact), dirX/dirZ normalize + mtx2 construction incl m11-sign branch senses (c.le.s 0<=m11), both 0.05/(theta*4/tau) gates (senses 0<theta, 0<mtx01, arg1y<mtx01 / mtx01<0, mtx01<arg1y), theta==0 -> 1.0, clamp senses. Fix = reassociate the C sum to match ASM; verify with a proj->unk64 trace lane. DO NOT transcribe from this note; re-derive from ASM.
